programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunting Vampires
programme.desc: Josh explores the history of vampirism in Romania and Bulgaria.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Italy's Barbarian Booty
programme.desc: To find the plundered riches of the Roman Empire, Josh Gates must locate the tomb of the Visigoth king Alaric in Italy. The hunt extends from the capital of Rome to the southern city of Cosenza, where the mayor is spearheading an effort to find the tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Metal Library
programme.desc: Josh travels through the jungles of Ecuador to explore the watery depths of Tayos Cave for a legendary set of metal plates believed to be created by an advanced ancient civilization.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Ancient Secrets of Asia
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines and dives through murky waters in search of mythical weapons in Japan, ancient artifacts in Myanmar and hidden treasures in the Philippines.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: America's Lost Mysteries
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives deep into American mysteries by investigating the Lost Colony of Roanoke, searching for Jesse James' loot and looking out for Butch Cassidy's missing money.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Quest for King Arthur
programme.desc: Josh scours England, Wales, and Scotland to find the real life King Arthur.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Alaskan Mummies
programme.desc: Over the past two centuries, Alaska's Aleutian Islands have been a hotbed of exploration.

programme.title: Raised Hunting: What's Next
programme.desc: The Holders are closing one chapter and embarking on a whole new journey.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A devastating earthquake destroys an old church, a Delta 2 rocket explodes and showers Cape Canaveral with tons of flaming debris, a tornado that devastated buildings in Oklahoma and a Boeing 720 that is crashed via remote control by NASA.

programme.title: Alaska: Most Extreme
programme.desc: Alaska is bigger, badder, stronger and more dangerously unpredictable than any other place in the nation. With America's highest mountains, most powerful earthquakes, fiercest wildlife, biggest waves, and cruellest winters, it is raw unbridled nature.

programme.title: The Tidewater Boats Elite Redfish Series: Battle on the Boardwalk, Kemah, TX
programme.desc: The third annual Battle on the Boardwalk in Kemah with the 2nd Atlas All Star Team Open.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Greatest Generation
programme.desc: A look at the struggles and adversity faced by veterans from the Greatest Generation, and highlight a story from a hero veteran that has gone untold.

programme.title: The RVers: Choosing an RV: Towables
programme.desc: Learn about RV batteries and power accessories.

programme.title: The Given Right: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Mark chases an old warrior known as the Enchanted 9 in his home state of Iowa.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Big Run
programme.desc: Tickle mashes in his first large scale run of outlaw shine in years. Mark and Digger scramble to save their Popcorn legacy mash from runaway livestock. Mike ditches Daniel for a new full-time partner. Mark and Huck double their proof and their price.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Restoration Week
programme.desc: The crew restores two cabins and builds a barn door for their blacksmith shop. Mark Bowe scouts an old log cabin and drives through a river to visit the fishing cabin he and his crew built two years ago.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Lone Star Boneyard
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the crew start a new boneyard in Texas by building a timber frame barn and two log cabins with some help from their new business partner. Mark gets his first look at the incredible party barn they built the last time they were in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Mark Bowe checks out some renovated grain silos and the craziest treehouse in town while the guys put a roof on their Texas timber frame. Mark's log cabin gets a Texas-style makeover, and he gets some help from his new neighbors, the Junk Gypsies.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Battle-Ready
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his assistant, Katherine, work in Texas while the guys build a cabin in Virginia with their favorite crane operator, Mark Battle.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: What Am I Worth to You?
programme.desc: Anny is frustrated with Robert's promised shopping spree. Tania and Syngin disagree on their future plans. Anna feels Mursel is asking too much from her. Emily goes into labor, but there are complications. Then, meet new couple Mike and Natalie.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: You Don't Forget Your Past
programme.desc: Anna's friends have concerns about Mursel. Tania and Syngin butt heads. Blake and Jasmin's reunion falls flat. Natalie anxiously waits for Mike's arrival in the Ukraine. Juliana is third wheel when she finally meets Michael's ex.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: We Need to Talk
programme.desc: Mike learns of Natalie's past heartbreak. Anna weeps in a wedding dress. Anny has issues with Robert's exes. Emily doubts Sasha's dedication. Jasmin meets Blake's friends. Tania reveals she's leaving for a month. Juliana movies into Michael's new house.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: We Need to Talk
programme.desc: Four women will travel to the US to live with their overseas fiancés for the first time.

programme.title: Unpolished: Through Thick and Thin
programme.desc: An upcoming surgery bring the family together in a time of turmoil. Lexi's client has an interesting request for a portrait of her dead pet. Then, the Martone women head into the big city for a nail polish event where Lexi is an honoured guest.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: We Need to Talk
programme.desc: Mike learns of Natalie's past heartbreak. Anna weeps in a wedding dress. Anny has issues with Robert's exes. Emily doubts Sasha's dedication. Jasmin meets Blake's friends. Tania reveals she's leaving for a month. Juliana movies into Michael's new house.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Flying Trapeze
programme.desc: Kari's wedding starts with her 50-foot descent from the ceiling, while Brianna floats into her ceremony in a canoe. Monica bartends and offers tattoos at her backyard event, while Karen's guests get a horse and carriage ride.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Rally Towel
programme.desc: Amanda and her husband are cheered into their reception with rally towels, and Andrea wow guests with a special father-daughter dance.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Chork

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Dancing Santa
programme.desc: At Kellie's enchanted Christmas, wedding guests waltz with Santa Claus, while at Erica's rocked-out reception, the fists are pumping. Liz makes her grand entrance on a retractable staircase and Charelle is serenaded by her loyal sorority sisters.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Bling Team!
programme.desc: Toni decorates her big day with modern minimalism while Tamekia has blinged out every inch of her wedding.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Dance Off
programme.desc: Ali's beach wedding becomes a black light rave and Renee's vows go from heartfelt to funny.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Bacon Bar
programme.desc: Anjali is the princess at her medieval castle wedding, while Cammi serves up bacon during her Harvard University reception.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Bouncy House
programme.desc: Dena is a gourmet chef who will cook her own wedding feast, while Jen will have a barbeque truck and ice cream man dish out the food.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Yellow Brick Road
programme.desc: Micaela mixes a unity cocktail at the altar, while Karina gets roped with a Mexican wedding lasso.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Keeping the Faith
programme.desc: Theresa conducts a group reading for people of different faiths to show how everyone is connected by Spirit. A pastor, a rabbi, a practicing Buddhist and members of the Hindu faith receive meaningful readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Clearing the List
programme.desc: Reaching out to fans who've been on her mailing list for a decade, Theresa does a series of big group readings to clear her list. A man grieves as he wasn't able to save his dad, and two moms are reconnected to their children who took their own lives.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: I Did Not See This Coming
programme.desc: A group of women are visited by the best friend they lost, plus, Theresa's parents act as accomplices to bring peace to some friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Paranoia/ Library Cards

programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Supercuts
programme.desc: Find out which entrepreneur sparked a Jokers fashion debate, when Joe first starting 'nosing' people and which challenge was originally filmed for the pilot episode.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball
programme.desc: At a ski shop, Michael demonstrates the latest in winter gear: a hat that also makes hot coco. And later, when taking inventory at an abandoned garage, Michael stuns his co-worker when a ghostly violin strikes a chord, all by itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences

programme.desc: Newly fit Joshua takes Govind for a wild romp in the park while they go zorbing. Personal trainer Nathan pays homage to his favorite 80's movie by taking photographer Haley on the perfect pizza making date.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Tats for Love
programme.desc: Country girl Alex is looking for a devout man in Elijah, but he may not love Jesus enough to suit her Southern ways. Special effects makeup artist Taylor and bud-tender Lam commemorate their first date by getting sentimental tattoos together.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Love and Suds
programme.desc: Jamison and Gregorio, a self proclaimed 'adorakable bachelor', get wet and wild at the car wash before heading to a romantic picnic under the sunset.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Drag Queens and D-Bags
programme.desc: Professional Drag Queen Jason hopes to make sparks fly with fitness buff Cory in a metal work shop, but waits to drop the real bomb when he shows up at dinner in full Drag to see if Cory can handle it.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Singer-song writer Jaki is ready for something real and hopes to find it with professional skating pro Madison over kitty cuddles and margaritas.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Tased and Confused
programme.desc: Military veteran Callahan, who is obsessed with the color blue, may find love with Melissa, an accident-prone hedgehog owner with a big heart. Model Shane, and Alaia, a taser-toting swimsuit fashion designer, spend a glamorous day on a yacht at sea.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: License to Date
programme.desc: Young and fun entrepreneur Natalia is ready to let loose and find the man of her dreams with golf instructor Zack, if she doesn't kill him on the golf cart first.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Tapping into Your Heart
programme.desc: Philanthropist Rachel falls over conditioning coach PJ to learn some Hollywood stunts, and the chemistry is on fire.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Stuffing Is the Best Part
programme.desc: The eight remaining bakers begin by making their best holiday whoopie pies that evoke a randomly-assigned theme of turkey, pumpkin, Pilgrims or fall foliage. Then, they must create stuffed holiday cakes that reveal a surprise center when sliced open.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Thanksgiving's Just Around the Corner
programme.desc: The seven remaining bakers get creative with Thanksgiving-inspired desserts, and in the first round, their sweets feature canned cranberry sauce. Then, in the main heat, the bakers must invent a dessert highlighting their assigned harvest ingredient.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Ginger and Spice and Everything Nice
programme.desc: In this week's challenges, the six remaining bakers revel in the warm, taste bud-tingling flavour of ginger. They must make mini desserts highlighting candied ginger, then create three different types of holiday cookies inspired by family traditions.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: World Class Classics
programme.desc: Every culture has its own holiday traditions, and the four remaining bakers celebrate a couple of favorites by reinventing two Hanukkah classics: rugelach and macaroons. Then, they must create their own unique version of a holiday croquembouche.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Re-Gifting
programme.desc: Re-gifting is the theme of the week, as the four remaining bakers must make a candy apple dessert inspired by a candy apple gift, then figure out how turn the contents of a traditional gift basket into a delicious dessert.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Hoopla
programme.desc: The last three bakers must show off their decorating chops in order to be crowned 'Holiday Baking Champion.'

programme.desc: Five of the finest cookie makers around push the envelope when Eddie Jackson calls on them to craft creative Christmas cards out of cookies.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Holiday at the Ranch
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his chef friends create some of their favorite holiday dishes at the ranch. Scott Conant prepares polenta and a San Remo cocktail, Justin Warner makes oyster stuffing and a mulled sangria and Rocco DiSpirito makes a soup.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Blended Holidaze
programme.desc: The Bertinelli and Vitale clans are gathered together for a fun and festive celebration to keep the holiday spirit alive! The blended families will feast on crown roast of lamb with mint and green onion pesto, and almond-cranberry rice pilaf.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Christmas Is Coming

programme.desc: Alan is overjoyed that he'll no longer owe Judith alimony when she marries Herb. When their marriage plans are threatened due to Jake's disdain for his soon-to-be-stepfather, Alan enlists Charlie's help to keep Herb from getting cold feet.

programme.desc: When Berta brings her pregnant daughter, the one she thought would make something of herself, to Charlie's house to help clean, Alan gets to satisfy one of his secret fetishes. Meanwhile, Charlie ventures out of his familiar Malibu surroundings.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Corey's Been Dead for An Hour
programme.desc: Charlie becomes annoyed with Alan for constantly sponging off him and promising to cover the tab 'next time.' When Alan tries to leave Charlie the cheque for dinner with two women, Charlie tries to beat him at his own game.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Castrating Sheep in Montana
programme.desc: Alan expects the worst when Berta learns that he's been seeing her daughter, Naomi, but Berta's reaction is surprising and much worse than Alan could have imagined.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Walnuts and Demerol
programme.desc: As Charlie prepares for a steamy Christmas Eve with his date, friends and family keep dropping in and staying. When Evelyn discovers who Charlie's date is, she inexplicably becomes desperate to break them up before they go too far.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Castrating Sheep in Montana
programme.desc: Alan expects the worst when Berta learns that he's been seeing her daughter, Naomi, but Berta's reaction is surprising and much worse than Alan could have imagined.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Don't Worry, Speed Racer
programme.desc: When Jake tells Charlie and Alan that he often overhears his mother and Herb having sex, it triggers a repressed memory for Charlie. Rose tries to help Charlie work through the problem.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That's Summer Sausage, Not Salami
programme.desc: After getting to know Danielle, Charlie discovers that she shares some common interests with Alan and proceeds to set them up, but when things begin to heat up between them, Charlie becomes jealous.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Damn Stalker
programme.desc: When Rose announces she is moving to London, Charlie must face his true feelings for her. Meanwhile, Alan fudges his profile on an Internet dating service, attracting a fellow profile embellisher, Beverly.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Young People Have Phlegm Too
programme.desc: A sexy young girl who Charlie has been dating cajoles him into going to a hot new club and bringing Alan along to meet her friend. When they arrive, Charlie and Alan are mortified to learn that the partygoers consider them 'old.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Merely Slept With a Commie
programme.desc: When Evelyn expresses sympathy for a friend who had no mourners at her funeral, Alan and Charlie inform her that she's headed for the same fate. Instead of taking their comments as a motive to change, she cunningly makes them regret what they said.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Never Rains in Hooterville
programme.desc: When Jake starts covering his walls with posters of sexy women, Alan feels pressure to make the most of what little childhood his son has left. Meanwhile, Kandi embarks on a new career as an actress.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tucked, Taped and Gorgeous
programme.desc: Alan befriends Greg, a gay single dad, causing Alan and Charlie to re-examine their own sexual identities. Meanwhile, Jake has a crush on Greg's daughter, Sophie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Prostitutes and Gelato
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan must confront their 'daddy issues' when Evelyn's new boyfriend invites them to Las Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Media Room Slash Dungeon
programme.desc: Charlie reacts oddly after an evening with his mother, and Alan's date reacts oddly after having sex with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dum Diddy Dum Diddy Doo
programme.desc: Suffering from 'bimbo fatigue,' Charlie lets Alan set him up with a woman his own age.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: City of Great Racks
programme.desc: Charlie gets closer to consummating his relationship with Linda, but then he begins to see Rose's face everywhere he turns.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Putting Swim Fins on a Cat
programme.desc: Charlie has to find creative ways to entertain his girlfriend's four-year-old son while Alan becomes a human guinea pig.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Warning, It's Dirty
programme.desc: Charlie coaches Jake on the art of infidelity while his girlfriend is away for Christmas.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Come to Papa Jeff
programme.desc: When Christine's parents can't make it to Grandparent's Day at Ritchie's school, New Christine suggests that Jeff, the new man in Christine's life, go as Ritchie's special friend. Christine then learns that Jeff really is a grandfather.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Oh God, Yes

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Barb moves in with Christine after announcing that she and Pete plan to divorce. Meanwhile, when Barb moves in, Matthew relocates to Ritchie's room where he discovers his nephew's strange sleep habits.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Champ
programme.desc: When 'meanie moms' Marly and Lindsay guilt Christine into serving hot lunch at Ritchie's school, she finds herself serving with Stan and vows not to sleep with him again. Meanwhile, she and Matthew decide they must take control of their dating lives.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Playdate With Destiny
programme.desc: Christine's crush on Mr. Harris makes her lose her composure around him at Ritchie's school's fundraising gala. When Ritchie wins the raffle prize of a playdate with him, Christine is thrilled, until Richard's father-son plans threaten to spoil the fun.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Women 'N Tuition

programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Actor
programme.desc: The girls vie for the attention of a famous TV actor when he stars in a local play.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.desc: When the girls learn that a number of relatives are going to be visiting, they reminisce about times they've had to share a bed and strange places they've had to sleep, including a train station.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth or Consequences

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under Suspicion

programme.desc: Officers Boudreau and Hannett pursue a pair of intoxicated, out of control, teenage dirt bikers. Officer Bronson investigates a night-hunting case involving an animal he's never dealt with. And Officer Lucas gets creative trying to rescue a baby bird.

programme.desc: A New Jersey couple is ready trade their hectic lifestyle for the laid-back vibe of Tulum, Mexico. She wants a home that provides peace and solitude, while he wants an active community where they can socialize with friends.

programme.title: Beach Hunters: Long Island Beach Hunt
programme.desc: A couple searches for a waterfront property on Long Island, New York, where they can escape the noise and fast pace of the city. They're looking for unobstructed views, room to plant a garden and a property large enough for a pool.

programme.title: Beach Hunters: Getaway Right Away in Oregon
programme.desc: Now that their boys are grown, a couple looks to buy a vacation home on the Central Oregon Coast. They're looking for a quiet, secluded getaway, but finding a home with privacy, enough room for family and a perfect beach could be a challenge.

programme.title: Hawaii Life: Coming Home to Old Hawaii Charm

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Back Home to the Bahamas
programme.desc: A couple makes the move from Georgia to where she grew up in The Bahamas. He wants a yard big enough for a dog; she wants to ensure their house has the island charm she remembers.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Jurassic Jungle
programme.desc: The Australian tropics are perhaps the most mysterious part of the country. Impenetrable rainforest hides kangaroos that live in trees and a colossal bird with dinosaur feet.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Realm of the Wombat
programme.desc: The hostile dry plains of southern Australia are home to some extraordinary and lethal animals including deadly ants, killer bunnies and the surprisingly vicious wombat.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Desert of the Red Kangaroo
programme.desc: In the heart of Australia lives the red kangaroo, the largest marsupial on earth and a true master of adapting to the blistering desert heat.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Koala Forest

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult: Pilot
programme.desc: Leslie Wagner-Wilson spent her formative years as a member of the People's Temple under the guidance of Jim Jones. When the church uproots amidst scandal and settles in Guyana, Leslie is convinced to follow.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult
programme.desc: Flora Jessop was born at the bottom of an oppressive hierarchy established by the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, or the FLDS. Growing up in Colorado City, Arizona, she suffered greatly at the hands of her father.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult
programme.desc: A man blindly follows god-like cult leader Yahweh Ben Yahweh even when Yahweh unleashes a bloody campaign of murders and beheadings. He maintains his devotion until Yahweh's tyranny and violence is turned against his devoted follower.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Defenseless
programme.desc: A car races up to the ER of a Westchester hospital. Carlos Perez-Olivo, the driver, has been shot in his side and his wife, Peggy has been shot in the head. What horror has befallen this couple? The answer will challenge even experienced investigators.

programme.title: Family Man, Family Murderer: An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When pregnant Colorado mom, Shanann Watts and her two daughters vanish without a trace, her husband Chris pleads for his family's safe return. But as the investigation digs deeper, dark secrets are revealed and Chris transforms from family man to monster.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Down by the River
programme.desc: In a harrowing call, a terrified woman tries to give police clues: there's a gun, she's near a river, and her kids are at risk. After police find her body in the river, they learn a stomach-churning truth about a killer who's been a predator for years.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Cleveland 911 receives call from a panicked woman saying a mysterious man forced his way into her home and shot her boyfriend in front of their kids. Detectives have to untangle a twisted web of jealousy to find out who killed this young father and why.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Deadlift
programme.desc: A terrified neighbour calls 911 when she witnesses a young mother gunned down in her driveway. Police work to uncover a complex conspiracy that ripped the loving mother from her three children, just to keep dark secrets hidden.

programme.title: Murder in Michigan
programme.desc: In July 2003, the family of 80-year-old Dorothy Murphy is in a panic when their beloved matriarch disappears while running errands. When her burned car is found abandoned behind a Flint, Michigan nightclub, their fears are realized.

programme.title: Killed by Kindness
programme.desc: A riding injury forces an avid outdoorswoman to rely on a lineup of acquaintances. Signe Edwards finds out the hard way that trusting the wrong person can have deadly consequences.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Tragic Entanglement
programme.desc: Luis Frias makes John Walsh's personal most wanted list when Frias allegedly murders his common-law wife in front of their kids. Then, Callahan Walsh explores a bizarre case: Harold 'Butch' Knight leaves clues after confessing to killing his wife.

programme.title: Murder in Michigan
programme.desc: In July 2003, the family of 80-year-old Dorothy Murphy is in a panic when their beloved matriarch disappears while running errands. When her burned car is found abandoned behind a Flint, Michigan nightclub, their fears are realized.

programme.title: Killed by Kindness

programme.title: Murder Calls: Deadlift
programme.desc: A terrified neighbour calls 911 when she witnesses a young mother gunned down in her driveway. Police work to uncover a complex conspiracy that ripped the loving mother from her three children, just to keep dark secrets hidden.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A series of bizarre 911 calls come in to police in two cities from a serial killer confessing his crimes. The man becomes known as the Weepy Voiced Killer, due to his strange, whining voice--and many young women will fall before he can be stopped.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Silencer
programme.desc: With the help of a neighbor, an injured woman calls 911 saying an intruder broke into her boyfriend's home and shot them both. Police respond and find the boyfriend executed. Cops must decipher strange evidence left behind to identify the killer.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Truck driver Bob Nelson is a week from completing his final cross-country ride before returning to his family and celebrating his 25th wedding anniversary. When he fails to show, cops discover his abandoned truck and a crime scene that raises questions.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A househunting trip along the Ohio Turnpike in Spring 2005 for Dr. Gulam Moonda and his wife, Donna, ends in disaster when a gunman approaches on the side of the highway.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Hide and Creep
programme.desc: For a mom of three, a trip to the casino is a chance to escape for some fun. But when her journey is cut short and she fails to return home, her family panics and launches a search for her and her vehicle that ultimately reveals a terrible truth.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Through a Child's Eyes
programme.desc: In 1982, 35-year-old JoAnn Tate was stabbed to death in her home in St Louis. Her kids Melissa, 7, and Renee, 4, nearly died. JoAnn's diary revealed a man Melissa ID'd as the attacker. Years later, new memories emerged that changed everyone's lives.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Secrets on the Lake
programme.desc: In 2000, 31-year-old Mike Williams vanished while duck hunting on a Florida lake. His boat and his shotgun were found, but not his body. Seventeen years later, a violent kidnapping led detectives to suspects who had been there all along.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Taken in Tennessee
programme.desc: In 2011, 20-year-old Holly Bobo was abducted from her home in rural Tennessee. A search turned up some of her personal items, including her cell phone. But Holly was gone. The trail went cold for two years until a hunter made a gruesome find.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love at First Text
programme.desc: When a single mom finds her dream man online, she can't believe her luck. But her quest to meet him soon turns into every mother's worst nightmare. As police scramble to avert tragedy, they discover the most elaborate web of lies they've ever seen.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: When a tech-savvy computer whiz fails to make the grade as a pro video gamer, he becomes obsessed with finding internet infamy. What starts as an online prank spirals into a new, deadly crime called 'swatting' that chills the nation.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Social Media Butterfly
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman moves to New York City, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. A tragic chain of events unfolds in which her unique tattoo plays a critical role.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Devil's Pact
programme.desc: When a young mother of three plummets into depression, she turns to the internet to find comfort. What she discovers is a virtual world of fetishes and fantasies, where seemingly helpful hands hide the darkest of intentions.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General Hideki Tojo is a cold-blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Curse of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: The story of the tomb. The prize that Howard Carter had sought all his life was to yield more than anyone could imagine. Thousands of pieces, crowned by the famous solid-gold coffin and solid-gold death mask.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Temple of the Sands
programme.desc: The story of how Belzoni made some of his greatest discoveries including the tomb of Seti I, the most beautiful in the Valley of the Kings, and the hidden entrance to the mysterious sand-covered temple of Ramesses at Abu Simbel.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Mystery of the Rosetta Stone
programme.desc: The story of the race to decipher Ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Terrific Tiny Homes: Double-decker Dreams
programme.desc: Quirky tiny houses are popping up everywhere. From a treehouse in Hawaii with a zip line and a hot tub to a solar-powered, double-decker tiny home in Maine, these are the most unusual, tricked-out tiny houses across America.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Greek Revival Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs preserve a Greek Rival farm house in Bentleyville, Pennsylvania. Main salvage items include mantles, tiles and a full-sized chicken coop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Marion Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Marion, Virginia, to salvage a soon-to-be renovated bowling alley. However, the bowling alley floor turns out to be far heavier than they anticipated.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Mine Master's House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Quakertown, Pennsylvania, in order to reclaim items from an old mine master's house. They are surprised to find much of the house picked over before they arrive.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Covington Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work on Covington Church and find tambour doors, stairs and a jukebox. Mike and Tay build a locker bench, then the crew finds a propane spotlight.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Scott Boulevard Baptist Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Decatur, GA, to salvage the Scott Boulevard Baptist Church. Key items include arched doorways and large stained glass windows. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay build an iron console.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Little Chef Diner
programme.desc: The Dawgs stay in Roanoke to salvage an old diner sign. The crew also picks through a huge warehouse in Greensboro, NC. Back at the shop, the Whiteside family works together to build a clock from road signs.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wheeling Apartment
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the rest of the team salvage elements from an apartment building in Wheeling, WV. Key items include arched doors, a double drain board sink and wooden medallions.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: P.A. Denny Riverboat
programme.desc: The Dawgs save a calliope from a riverboat in Parkersburg, WV. They also split into teams to pick through the owner's large warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Nehi Bottling Plant
programme.desc: Mike and the team salvage large industrial doors from the old Nehi Bottling Plant in Covington, VA.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former First National Bank
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs take on the former first National Bank in Gastonia, NC. Key items salvaged include elevator parts and chicken wire windows. At the shop, Robert builds a bar out of a boat salvaged from Smith Mountain Lake.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Spanish Colonial Ranch Revival
programme.desc: Brett takes on a Spanish Colonial Revival that has had all of the beautiful original woodwork covered over with layers of paint. It's painstaking work to bring it back and the team hits some serious snags.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage
programme.desc: A cottage build in 1926 was a severely neglected rental for 30 years. Brett deals with a leaky roof, rotten windows, missing floorboards and damaged walls.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Good Eats: Potato, My Sweet
programme.desc: Typecast as a character actor on the culinary stage, the potato is ready to be a star.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ill Gotten Grains
programme.desc: Take a look at the non-traditional grains couscous, wheat berries and bulgur.

programme.title: Good Eats: In the Bulb of the Night (Garlic)
programme.desc: Meet the Count and discover the miraculous properties of the humble garlic bulb.

programme.title: Good Eats: Olive Me
programme.desc: Alton demystifies the flavourful little olive, which has changed the course of history.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Crenn
programme.desc: Dominique Crenn has come to Kitchen Stadium to take on the ultimate challenger Iron Chef Symon.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian Vs. Darin
programme.desc: Chef Fernando Darin was born into an Italian family in the Brazilian countryside and he's bringing his international flair to his culinary contest with Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Thiam
programme.desc: Brooklyn based chef Pierre Thiam takes on Iron Chef Bobby Flay in a culinary showdown. Can Chef Thiam's Senegalese dishes overshadow Iron Chef Flay's Southwestern spin?

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione vs. Zimmerman
programme.desc: Marc Forgione faces off against the executive chef at Sepia, Andrew Zimmerman.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli vs. Clark
programme.desc: Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli faces off against Challenger Robert Clark.

programme.desc: Fish master Chef Pasternak challenged Iron Chef Morimoto.

programme.desc: An insider's peek into eateries across America that are creating unique desserts. American sweets; soda shop; and classic diner desserts.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Wild West Sweets

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Nightmare Delivery
programme.desc: Molly plunges into a scuba dog diving cake while baker Ben creates an edible beer barrel cake with a working tap. Meanwhile, Karisha faces her worst delivery yet.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Leather-Bound Cake
programme.desc: A cake that looks identical to four, legal-bound volumes for a publishing company; a cake that is the same shape and size of a Shetland pony; a wedding cake specialist creates a cake that is over two foot tall.

programme.title: Crazy Cookie Builds: Polar Bears And Holiday Doll House
programme.desc: A local zoo asks expert bakers Brenda Nibley and Elisa Barber to create a cookie build that celebrates the arrival of new polar bears.

programme.title: Food Network Kitchen Cook-Along

programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Present
programme.desc: When Hiro finds a wrapped present in the closet, he assumes it's from Aunt Cass and takes it in order to figure out what it is. However, after a mix-up, the present becomes lost and Hiro enlists the Big Hero 6 team to track it down.

programme.title: Movie: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: Santa's youngest son wants to use his father's workshop for an urgent mission on Christmas night.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Christmas Vacation!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb want to show Santa how grateful they are for the work that he does every year at Christmas time by transforming the city of Danville into a giant shimmering thank you card and building a rest stop for Santa to relax in.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Happy New Year!
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: World of X Games: Woodward Peace Park Championship 2019
programme.desc: Watch 21 of the world's elite snowboarding men and women session on custom-built, jaw dropping features at Boreal Mountain, California.

programme.title: World of X Games: Alex Ferreira: The Scenic Route
programme.desc: Join world-champion skier, Alex Ferreira as he travels across the globe to grow his love of for the sport by discovering extraordinary people, places and cultures.

programme.title: World of X Games: The Regiment of Henrick Harlaut
programme.desc: A film project from professional freestyle skier Henrik Harlaut. Today, Henrik is one of the only skiers to compete at the highest level while also filming some of the most influential video parts of the past decade.

programme.title: World of X Games: Jamie Anderson: Unconditional
programme.desc: Powder, slush, corduroy and pillows, Unconditional presents the wide pan of Jamie Anderson’s 2019 season as she sets out to expands her horizon beyond the contest bib.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Paradise: From the Ashes
programme.desc: The emotional journey of the Paradise High School football team, one year removed from the wildfires that scorched their town and claimed 86 lives. E:60 follows the Paradise Bobcats on their path to rebuild.

programme.title: Movie: Head Full of Honey
programme.desc: A grandfather suffering from Alzheimer's disease puts a strain on his son's marriage with his deteriorating condition, but his granddaughter is determined to help him. Without telling her parents, she runs off with her grandfather to Venice.

programme.title: Movie: Shanghai Knights
programme.desc: In the 1880s, a sheriff and his sidekick travel to England to avenge a father's death.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: To her family's displeasure, a young girl falls in love with an orphaned woodcutter. The couple plans to run away together until they learn that her sister has been killed by a werewolf terrorizing their village.

programme.title: Movie: The Recruit
programme.desc: A mentor asks a talented young CIA trainee to help find a mole inside the agency.

programme.title: Movie: The Town
programme.desc: While planning his next bank heist, a career criminal juggles his feelings for a bank manager from a previous robbery.

programme.title: Movie: The Predator
programme.desc: A curious young boy accidentally triggers the return of the galaxy's deadliest hunters to Earth. The genetically upgraded Predators are stinger, faster and more dangerous than before, and it's up to small group of ex-soldiers to stop the invasion.

programme.title: Movie: Machete
programme.desc: A former Federale is hired to assassinate a senator, but he discovers that his mission is actually a betrayal by those who hired him.

programme.title: Movie: Unfriended: Dark Web
programme.desc: A young man brings home a laptop abandoned in a lost-and-found bin, and in a secret file on it he discovers disturbing videos. After sharing them with his friends in an attempt to determine whether or not they're real, they find themselves targeted.

programme.title: Movie: A Nightmare on Elm Street
programme.desc: Wielding a glove with four blades as fingers, a serial killer stalks and murders people in their dreams, which results in their real life death.

programme.title: Movie: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: Inspired by their friend's sudden death, three life-long friends go on a journey to fulfill their long-time dream of finding a lost fortune in the Oregon Mountains.

programme.title: Ferrell Takes the Field
programme.desc: Comedy superstar Will Ferrell appears at five different spring training ballparks in Arizona, he plays every position on the field for 10 different teams on the same day.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Marwen
programme.desc: After a horrific attack leaves him broken and with no memories, Mark Hogancamp copes with his painful and confusing life by building a miniature replica of a World War II village, complete with resident dolls that resemble himself and his friends.

programme.title: 24/7: Kelly Slater
programme.desc: A revealing look inside the the surfer's life as he prepares for the Billabong Pipe Masters in Oahu, Hawaii.

programme.title: Movie: RoboCop
programme.desc: A cop who is killed while on the job is transformed into an ultra-sophisticated cyborg.

programme.title: Movie: I, Robot
programme.desc: In 2035, robots that have been programmed to never hurt humans have become part of the daily lives of people. When the main suspect in the murder of a scientist is a robot, a robot-hating detective begins to wonder if humans are actually safe.

programme.title: Watchmen: It's Summer and We're Running Out of Ice
programme.desc: In an alternate America where police conceal their identities behind masks to protect themselves from a terrorist organization, Detective Angela Abar and Chief Judd Crawford investigate the attempted murder of a cop.

programme.title: Watchmen: Martial Feats of Comanche Horsemanship
programme.desc: As Angela relives haunting memories of an attack on her family, she detains a mysterious man who claims responsibility for Tulsa’s most recent murder. Elsewhere, an original play is performed for an audience of one.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Bowl Buster

programme.desc: While on a cruise, Tommy finds Pam in bed with Cole.

programme.desc: Gina's mother comes to visit while she is away and wants to spend time with Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Auction
programme.desc: Martin gives his cuckoo clock to Pam who donates it to a charity auction.

programme.desc: Synclaire and Overton's parents meet for the first time at the engagement party.

programme.title: Living Single: Papa Was a Rolling Stone
programme.desc: Overton and Synclaire exchange wedding vows.

programme.desc: As Overton and Synclaire prepare to tie the knot, Kyle wrestles with a knotty decision.

programme.title: Living Single: Love Don't Live Here Anymore
programme.desc: A night of passion for Max and Kyle forces them to make a decision.

programme.title: Living Single: Love Don't Live Here Anymore
programme.desc: Synclaire and Overton are stranded on a deserted island, and Max makes a choice.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Butler's Son Did It
programme.desc: Geoffrey's son returns and everyone loves him, but there's something they don't know.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hare Today
programme.desc: Phillip accidentally kills Nicky's pet rabbit while Carleton and Ashley compete to sing.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Stank Horse

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Stank Hole in One

programme.title: Movie: Soul Plane
programme.desc: Last-minute passenger additions shake things up on an airline's maiden flight.

programme.title: Movie: Hallmark Hall of Fame: A Christmas Love Story
programme.desc: A youth-choir director is tasked with writing the title song for her Christmas Eve show but becomes distracted when a gifted boy joins the choir. Unbeknownst to her, this boy does not tell his widowed father of his plans to sing in the service.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: A historian is hired to create a Christmas display at the Plaza. While working, she learns that fate has prevailed and teamed her up with a handsome decorator to help bring the display, and their romance, to life.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Dollywood
programme.desc: When a NYC event planner returns to Tennessee to plan the Christmas celebration at Dollywood, she's paired with the head of operations who thinks he can handle the party just fine on his own.

programme.title: Movie: Picture a Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: A world-travelling photographer takes some time off at Christmas to care for her grandmother. While there, she meets her neighbour, who needs help caring for his young nephew, and love develops.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: Movie: A Wish for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa grants a wish for a woman and she gets a chance to prove herself to her boss. Santa's wish only gives her 48 hours and as the clock ticks down, she channels the Christmas magic and speaks her mind all on her own.

programme.title: Movie: Coming Home for Christmas
programme.desc: While planning a final Christmas gala at the exquisite Ashford Estate, a house manager falls for the handsome executor of the estate.

programme.title: Movie: Sleigh Bells Ring
programme.desc: A recently divorced woman struggles to get into the holiday spirit while heading up her hometown parade. With the help of a Christmas sleigh and a handsome woodworker, she is destined to turn her luck around.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Candace Cameron Bure from the Hallmark Channel movie 'Christmas Town' stops by. Then, Courtney Rich whips up a chai white chocolate raspberry cake.

programme.title: Movie: Love You Like Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Miss Christmas
programme.desc: Nicknamed 'Miss Christmas,' the official tree finder for the Radcliffee tree lighting, is left desperate to find the perfect tree. A letter sends her to a small town and a man who doesn't want to part with this tree.

programme.title: Movie: Office Space
programme.desc: A computer programmer's sudden professional nonchalance leads to bizarre success.

programme.desc: With inside facts and Frontier Extras: Eivin hauls a pole barn back to his homestead, Jewel arrives for a visit and August builds a unique outhouse.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Tangled in the Tide
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier Extras: Eivin and Atz Sr. face the dangers of a rocky beach after getting tangled in mooring line. Atz Lee and Jane teach the kids how to fish and Otto and Charlotte give Eve a memorable gift.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: The Kilchers' backcountry winter wonderland celebration is threatened when unseasonably warm weather brings rain to the homestead. But it's not the first or last time that the family must cope with chaos on the homestead.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: North Pole
programme.desc: Bryce Ward, mayor of North Pole, and his dad, Jeff, build a family recreation cabin deep in the woods of Alaska with the help of their life-long camping buddies.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: The Kilchers' backcountry winter wonderland celebration is threatened when unseasonably warm weather brings rain to the homestead. But it's not the first or last time that the family must cope with chaos on the homestead.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Hummer Time
programme.desc: When Redbeard challenges Heavy D to repurpose some old inventory, Heavy decides to marry a stretched 6 door F650 with a camper to create the ultimate expedition vehicle. And the guys buy a Hummer H1 from a mysterious mountain man.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Motors and Rotors
programme.desc: Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Dieselsellerz crew scramble to finish a six-door stretched F650 Expedition Camper for a big client. And Heavy D shocks the team with his latest flip- a diesel-powered experimental helicopter.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Somersault
programme.desc: Heavy D tests the physics abilities of the shop to build a somersaulting truck to use for viral videos. The Muscle turns a Dodge Ram into a modern pop-up camper.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Flippin' Diesel
programme.desc: The diesel brothers are up against the clock for their SEMA build: a replica Ford Bronco made from an F350 and an Excursion. Heavy D brings in physics help to make his dream of a somersaulting truck come true.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Good Bros and Goodbyes
programme.desc: The Dieselsellerz SEMA build hits a snag, and the guys scramble to find a replacement. They decide to rebuild and give away their most iconic build: The Megaram.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Wham, Bam, C10 Slam
programme.desc: A big new client asks Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Dieselsellerz crew to turn a busted 1969 Chevy C10 into a diesel-drinking lowrider, and the guys run into a perfect fix and flip Prolite race truck, which Heavy tests at a local dirt track.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Thunder or Lightning
programme.desc: For the Dieselsellerz giveaway, Thunder VS Lightning, two lifted F450s compete and the winner decides which one to take home. And the guys continue turning a busted 69 Chevy C10 into a diesel low rider for a millionaire client.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Not So Easy Rider
programme.desc: The guys face a huge challenge when a big dollar collector asks them to slam a 1969 Chevy C10. Meanwhile, Heavy D and the guys are off to bike week at Sturgis, to check out a one-of-a-kind hydrostatic diesel motorcycle.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Soar Like a Diesel
programme.desc: Heavy D and the crew transform a rundown Canadian logging truck into a maxed out, custom semi to transport their builds cross country. Plus, Diesel Dave and the Muscle go head to head building two ultimate Diesel Daily Drivers for their next giveaway.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Dave Is My Co-Pilot
programme.desc: While the shop finishes the semi build, Heavy D moves full steam ahead with his plan to attempt a death-defying stunt in the Brodozer. To complement the jump, Heavy D plans a live giveaway inspired by one of their most popular builds, the US Duramax.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Now Departing: Diesel Air
programme.desc: Heavy D buys a busted one-of-a-kind rock crawler and gives it the Sparks Motors treatment for a quick flip. Meanwhile, a friend commissions a 1,000 gallon fuel truck and two custom diesel-powered fertilizer spreaders for his helicopter business.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Raising Heli
programme.desc: Heavy D attempts to salvage a wrecked overland camper from Europe he bought at auction. Meanwhile, the team races to complete a 1,000 gallon fuel truck and two custom diesel-powered fertilizer spreaders for a helicopter operation.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Stars and Spirits
programme.desc: Theresa's in Hollywood to read stars of the past and present. 80's superstar Taylor Dayne, Say Yes To The Dress Atlanta's Monte Durham, The Office's Kate Flannery, Roseanne's Michael Fishman, and Family Matters' dad Reginald VelJohnson.

programme.desc: Mike learns of Natalie's past heartbreak. Anna weeps in a wedding dress. Anny has issues with Robert's exes. Emily doubts Sasha's dedication. Jasmin meets Blake's friends. Tania reveals she's leaving for a month. Juliana movies into Michael's new house.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: We Need to Talk

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pink Slime
programme.desc: Michael feeds some book worms while working at a book store. Plus, he serves food and gives new meaning to the phrase 'grass fed beef'. Then, he spooks his assistant at a food testing center with an experiment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Flash Melt
programme.desc: Find out which trick occurred when a location fell through at the lasts second, and how the producers dealt with screaming kids during a shoot day. Plus, find out who crossed paths with Michael months after being tricked.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Speed Thieves
programme.desc: Michael adds spice to lunch at a diner, and at a furniture store, he shows his co-worker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Industrial Asphalt Sealant
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it. A man can vanish into a manhole, and maybe even a manhole can vanish itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Essence of the Wings
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back
programme.desc: Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice controlled page turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized. And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dummy Talks
programme.desc: At an appliance store, a man goes bananas over Michael's self-stocking fridge. Then, Michael speeds up the life cycle of a frog in a science lab, and he pulls the strings at an estate sale when a haunted doll toys with his assistant.

programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Rattled
programme.desc: In Jasper County, Game Warden Boone responds to a venomous rattlesnake. Game wardens investigate the illegal killing of a goose in the Texas Panhandle.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Big Croc Diaries
programme.desc: Steve and Terri introduce their favorite crocodiles at Australia Zoo, including a close-up examination of the five biggest crocs they lunge and strike. High-speed film sequences show the tremendous power and speed of each crocodile.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Musical Kittens
programme.desc: A Turkish Van mom needs the help of a canine companion to keep her kittens in check.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Scared to Laugh
programme.desc: Symone is already an aggressive cat, but the sound of Kelly laughing or crying launches her into a bloodthirsty attack. Also, Alex is afraid that her mom will get rid of her cat when she leaves for college.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Happy Couple of Camels
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a beloved German Shepherd walk again. The team tries to rescue a scared dog on the loose outside the clinic. Dr. Don must move fast when a family cat eats poison. And Dr. Jeff and Hector head for the mountains to help two rescued camels.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Training Day
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne must remove tumors from an older dog, while Dr. Ross tries to save a rabbit's foot that's been damaged by a dog attack. Before he can compete with Dr. Ross in a puppy-training competition, Dr. Blue visits a farm to castrate a donkey.

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Leo, a snow leopard rescued from Pakistan, is having trouble eating because of a broken canine. The bird department works feverishly to restore a beehive for the bee-eater birds. Ambassador Center staff work with an adorable fennec fox named Charlie.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Tough Love
programme.desc: Blue Poison dart frog Bertha loves to wrestle. The zoo would like to breed her, but she's scared off all potential suitors. The keeps introduce some new young male frogs, in hope that one of them will be strong enough.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tia's dream of relocating becomes a nightmare as fate turns against her. And, a call from the former owner of one of Villalobos most aggressive dogs leads to the ranch's most emotional reunion yet.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Blood
programme.desc: Tia decides to hire new parolees, but one parolee may blow his chance at redemption before the first day is done. And then, one of Villalobos most beloved dogs, Creature, is on the receiving end of shocking news that may end his chances of being adopted.

programme.title: River Monsters: Russian Killer

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Ringer
programme.desc: A socially awkward groom-to-be employs a best-man-for-hire to put together a wedding impressive enough to satisfy his in-laws. As the big day approaches and plans are well underway, the two guys find an unlikely bromance forming.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Family Reunion

programme.title: The Parkers: The Dates From Hell

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Where There's a Will There's a Way

programme.title: Black-ish: Under the Influence

programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda takes Jack and Diane to her part of town in a black neighbourhood and claims the twins are scared of their own community. Dre and Rhonda take them to a local diner to show them why it's so special.

programme.title: Good Bones: Risky Reno With Historic Charm

programme.desc: In the summer of 1991, a pair of half-siblings creates panic across southern California when they embark on a spree of random crimes of the worst kind, targeting people out doing everyday tasks.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Chris Watts: Confession Untold
programme.desc: Investigators speak for the first time on one of the most baffling cases they've encountered, exposing the devastating truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of seemingly devoted husband and father, Chris Watts.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Lewis and Machuca

programme.title: Snapped: Jennifer Morrisey
programme.desc: When a concerned co-worker discovers a man executed in his home in a well to do neighbourhood police are sent down a winding road of greed, drugs, and heartbreak to uncover a spiteful murderer.

programme.desc: Police investigating the murder of a devoutly religious couple uncover dark family secrets, leading them to a suspect that shocks everyone.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Winkler
programme.desc: Desperate to find her way out of financial crisis and escape a troubled marriage, this wholesome preacher's wife exchanged virtue for the ultimate vice.
