programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Twist
programme.desc: The murder of a beautiful California mom beloved by four men reopens a puzzling mystery surrounding the untimely death of another young woman decades earlier on a desolate mountain trail in Georgia.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Twist
programme.desc: The murder of a beautiful California mom beloved by four men reopens a puzzling mystery surrounding the untimely death of another young woman decades earlier on a desolate mountain trail in Georgia.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The Fifth Man
programme.desc: The team investigates a compromised intel operation after four people connected to the classified project are killed at a diner explosion. As Deeks and Kensi are on the trail of those involved, they learn that a wayward teenage girl might be related.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: CSI on Fire
programme.desc: Five bodies are found in what appears to be a meteor crash site in the middle of the desert. CSI Finlay recognizes one of the casualties, prompting her to revisit her past.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Dead Body Politic
programme.desc: The NCIS: LA team investigates the tragic death of a U.S. senatorial candidate's staffer who is run over crossing the street. The high-profile case becomes a matter of national security.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Out of the Past
programme.desc: A CIA agent Sam used to work with over eight years ago seeks his help but is soon found dead of an apparent suicide. Hanna and Callen suspect foul play and a bigger conspiracy. Meanwhile, Deeks finds his inner 'dog whisperer'.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Rude Awakenings
programme.desc: The team continues their investigation behind the death of a CIA agent that leads to a dangerous ring of Russian super agents. In a race against time, Hanna risks having a secret exposed.

programme.title: NCIS: Stop the Bleeding
programme.desc: Gibbs fights for his life aboard a Navy hospital ship after being shot. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and Joanna Teague travel to Shanghai to try and take down the Calling.

programme.title: NCIS: Personal Day
programme.desc: Gibbs calls on the team to assist DEA Agent Luis Mitchell with a case that keeps going cold. Also, the team gossips about Gibbs' new look after he replaces his standard military haircut and polo shirt for a modern cut and tailored dress shirt.

programme.title: NCIS: Incognito
programme.desc: Bishop and McGee go undercover as a married couple to investigate the murder of a marine who was killed hours before meeting Gibbs about a possible case.

programme.title: NCIS: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Vance partners with Gibbs and returns to field duty when a murder case is connected to a former NCIS agent he locked up for stealing evidence.

programme.title: NCIS: Lockdown

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gal of Constant Sorrow

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Veterinarian

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Alien Solar Systems
programme.desc: Since the first discovery of a planet orbiting another star, some 280 alien solar systems have been identified. It's only by looking at solar systems far beyond our own, that we can understand how remarkable our universe is.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Nightmares of Neutron Stars
programme.desc: Neutron stars are strange and violent phenomena which defy the laws of physics, and new discoveries show that these bizarre nightmares are potentially far deadlier than we ever thought, with the power to destroy planets and even other stars.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Uranus and Neptune: Rise of the Ice Giants
programme.desc: Uranus and Neptune are mysterious, icy worlds at the edge of our solar system, and new discoveries reveal that these strange planets might have helped start life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: First Second of the Big Bang
programme.desc: The first second of the Universe, the creation of everything when space, time, matter and energy burst into existence. It is the most important second in history, which seals the Universe's fate and defines everything that comes after - including us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Alien Galaxies
programme.desc: The evolution of galaxies, from clouds of gas to magnificent spirals that fill our night.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of the Moon
programme.desc: A look at the secrets hidden in our moon.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: Giant magnetic bubbles millions of miles wide, bizarre invisible matter, and a death star tearing through bands of icy comets, flinging them into violent orbits. All this and more could be inside our cosmic backyard, and effecting our lives on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: American Justice: A Warrant to Kill
programme.desc: A look at the dispute between Deputy Sheriff Joseph Kent McGowan and Susan White.

programme.title: American Justice: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Police investigate a photographer when a model goes missing after a photo shoot.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Family Ties
programme.desc: Family bonds and family struggles take center stage when a man approaches Robb and Bethany and asks them to help find his missing daughter whom he fears is dead. The ROC squad set up a high-profile sting to capture a group of thieves preying on Tampa.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: Like any dad, Titus wants the best for his son. As an EMT, he sees just how dire life can get. Meanwhile, police officers continue to work desperately to get guns off the street and make the city a safer place to live.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: The SWAT team responds to a dangerous call out: a man has barricaded himself in his apartment and is shooting multiple rounds aimlessly out the window. Trapped on the scene are a number of patrol officers who Rich Emberlin and his squad must rescue.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Manson Family Murders
programme.desc: In the late 60s, Charles Manson entices dozens of young women to live with him in a California desert commune. The facade breaks when Manson orders his followers to commit a string of gruesome murders that 50 years later, still haunt the nation's psyche.

programme.title: Jonestown: A Deadly Devotion
programme.desc: When Jim Jones, the head of a Utopian commune, becomes increasingly tyrannical and unhinged, once-devoted members of the group are desperate to get out alive.

programme.title: Scientology: A Student's Descent
programme.desc: When a devote member of the Church of Scientology becomes a spy for the organization, she gets trapped in their secret war against its critics.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Handful of Coins
programme.desc: When a loving mother is found gunned down just steps from her front door, police in her small town are baffled. As the investigation unfolded, a sense of confusion would quickly boil into outrage.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Secret to Kill For
programme.desc: An Air Force Major is found beaten to death outside his home, leaving police, and the military, to piece together the crime and find his killer.

programme.title: The Lost Women of NXIVM
programme.desc: The story of four women who were part of the NXIVM sex-cult, these women later ended up dying, or vanishing without a trace.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Tried to Prevent This
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kathy Swanson feared her son, Michael, would one day harm someone. For 17 years, she tried in vain to convince people that something about Michael was different until that dreadful day finally came that her worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: The Lost Women of NXIVM
programme.desc: The story of four women who were part of the NXIVM sex-cult, these women later ended up dying, or vanishing without a trace.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Tried to Prevent This
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kathy Swanson feared her son, Michael, would one day harm someone. For 17 years, she tried in vain to convince people that something about Michael was different until that dreadful day finally came that her worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Secret to Kill For
programme.desc: An Air Force Major is found beaten to death outside his home, leaving police, and the military, to piece together the crime and find his killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Truth Never Dies
programme.desc: When a young woman is found shot to death in her home police are baffled. Then a cryptic letter from a mysterious source sends the investigation down a twisting road to the truth.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Connected by Murder
programme.desc: Three terrifying murders are connected together by one common thread. After years of frustration and heartbreak, three investigators, from three different states, must work together to solve the crimes.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder at Sea
programme.desc: The small fishing town of Craig, Alaska is stunned when a premiere fishing boat explodes into flames just off shore. After fighting the flames, state troopers discover the remains of a young family and few clues as to could have set the ship blaze.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When three women from three different decades meet their death or go missing under mysterious circumstances, authorities are forced to examine the one thing they had in common: they all fell in love with the same man.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Vengeance
programme.desc: A woman accuses her boyfriend of raping her and then finds herself on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dateline: Missing Marie
programme.desc: Marie Singleton who worked for the CIA vanishes. Police follow all leads even considering it might be espionage related. Case remained unsolved for years until one day Marie's son Marcus, now a grown man, unleashes a memory of his mother's killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Death of a Golden Girl
programme.desc: A playboy model is murdered on New Year's Eve and there are no suspects.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Screams of the South Pacific
programme.desc: Serena Karlan leaves everything she knows behind to join her boyfriend, retired NBA champion Bison Dele, aboard his catamaran in the South Pacific. Serena is the happiest she's ever been, until Dele's estranged brother surfaces and throws them off course.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Burned
programme.desc: After a whirlwind romance, newlywed Karen leaves everything behind to start a dream life on the water with husband David. But the dream soon turns into a nightmare when David's true colors emerge. And trapped on the sea, there's nowhere to run.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Lady of the Lake
programme.desc: Florence and Mark Unger love nothing more than vacationing at the lake with their two boys. Life is perfect, until an old sports injury pulls Mark into the depths of painkiller addiction. To keep her family afloat, Florence does whatever is necessary.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lake Erie is home to more than 2,000 shipwrecks mostly due to it's shallow bottom. For local fisherman, Chris Leclair, navigating a double life proves just as treacherous. When his wife, Karen uncovers his dark secret he's caught in a net of lies.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: America's Zombie Army
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, the United States of America searches for a way to create a generation of super soldiers who use telepathy to win battles. In the 1950s, gangster Whitey Bulger volunteers for the CIA's LSD project known as MK-Ultra.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Raise the Roof: Bungalow Gets a Spanish Makeover
programme.desc: Keith turns a bland, yellow-brick bungalow into a stunning Spanish-style mansion.

programme.title: Raise the Roof: Third Floor's a Charm?
programme.desc: Keith wants to flip a century-old Craftsman bungalow in Denver, but it needs something special to overcome the downside of its location on a busy street. He creates a spacious living area, builds three bedrooms, and a luxury master suite.

programme.title: Raise the Roof: Colorful Victorian Cottage Remodel
programme.desc: A chef and his wife feel cramped in their 100-year-old Victorian cottage with no master suite and an outdated kitchen. Keith adds a stylish master suite, creates a modern kitchen and gives the unique exterior a bright new face.

programme.title: Raise the Roof: Sinking Home to Dream Home
programme.desc: Keith pays a premium for a house on a huge corner lot but quickly runs into trouble when he finds a giant sinkhole under one bedroom.

programme.title: Raise the Roof: Craftsman Bungalow Gets a New Second Story
programme.desc: An investor brings Keith a promising flip prospect that another builder started, but abandoned in the early stages of demolition. It's an early 20th Century Craftsman bungalow with an unfinished basement and a classic Craftsman style interior.

programme.title: Raise the Roof: Ripping Off the Roof Makes Room for Baby
programme.desc: A Denver couple with two young boys is expecting a new baby, and they need more room in their 100-year-old house. Keith rips off the roof and adds a dormer, giving them a new master suite, nursery and a fun bedroom for the boys.

programme.title: Raise the Roof: 1920 Bungalow Gets 2nd Story
programme.desc: Keith plans to flip a 917 square foot, two bedroom, one bath bungalow in a fast growing neighborhood in Denver, Colorado. Because the house was built in 1920, the home has small rooms and limited living space compared to modern homes in the area.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Work of Art
programme.desc: Cupcake makers face off to be centered at an exclusive party for the Festival of Arts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Bigger and Better in Texas
programme.desc: Discover a Forth Worth Tex Mex Burrito almost as big as the state of Texas itself.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats. He sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pizza Party
programme.desc: On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas in Georgia and Florida State.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzel-a, Queen of Dessert
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Crystal River, Florida, for the Florida Manatee Festival, where he tries the OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phnom Penh
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the complex flavors of Phnom Penh, Cambodia. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew discovers Seattle's iconic foods including Dungeness crab and teriyaki.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Louisville, Kentucky
programme.desc: Andrew explores Louisville icons like country ham, burgoo stew, and derby pie.

programme.desc: From ice cream- and cereal-stuffed burritos in LA to a deep-dish pizza wrapped in a whole other pizza in Chicago, these restaurants prove that good food is even greater when it comes in a tasty package.

programme.desc: A team of divers encounters alien life while searching for a nuclear submarine. The mysterious alien force has the power to change our world.

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Two children wander throughout exciting and dangerous parallel universes.

programme.title: Movie: Jobs
programme.desc: Explores the life and career of college dropout and creative entrepreneur, Steve Jobs.

programme.title: Movie: The Old Man & the Gun
programme.desc: A charming 70-year-old man with an easy smile and quiet demeanor meets a lovely woman while he's fleeing the police. The two begin a romance, despite him being a serial bank robber and a prison escapee who's captured the public's imagination.

programme.title: Watchmen: She Was Killed by Space Junk
programme.desc: Following a late-night visit from the Senator who authored Masked Policing Legislation in Oklahoma, FBI agent Laurie Blake heads to Tulsa to take over the recent murder investigation. Far away, the Lord of the Estate draws unwelcome attention.

programme.title: Watchmen: If You Don't Like My Story, Write Your Own
programme.desc: Reclusive trillionaire Lady Trieu finally enters the stage with a mysterious offer. With Blake getting closer to the truth of her coverup, Angela enlists Looking Glass for help. Meanwhile, the Lord trains two new servants.

programme.title: Watchmen: Little Fear of Lightning
programme.desc: The origin story of Looking Glass is at last revealed, as is the truth behind the greatest hoax in American history. Far away, the Smartest Man in the World plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Watchmen: This Extraordinary Being
programme.desc: Conflicted, damaged superheroes navigate a dystopian future.

programme.title: Watchmen: An Almost Religious Awe
programme.desc: Under Lady Trieu's care, Angela undergoes an unconventional treatment while Agent Blake chases down a lead. Elsewhere, The Smartest Man in The World delivers a stunning defense of his past actions.

programme.title: Movie: Wall Street: Money Never Sleeps
programme.desc: A young Wall Street trader partners with a disgraced, former trader to alert the financial world of the impending doom.

programme.title: Movie: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: A team of bomb technicians with only a few days left on their tour of Iraq, struggle to control their reckless new sergeant. The new leader puts the excitement of urban combat ahead of the safety of his men, forcing them into deadly situations.

programme.title: Movie: 12 Strong
programme.desc: A U.S. Special Forces team is sent to Afghanistan to secure local allies following the terrorist attacks of 9/11. Led by their new captain, the 12 men struggle with the difficult terrain, a vast cultural divide and a numerically superior enemy.

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: A harmless game of truth or dare between young friends takes a deadly turn when something starts killing those who refuse to answer truthfully or to follow through on a dare. One of its players tries to figure out how to end the game before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: An Ideal Husband
programme.desc: A husband's seemingly perfect life is threatened by evidence of a past misdeed.

programme.title: Movie: Away From Her
programme.desc: A loving, elderly couple enjoy a peaceful life together until the woman's lapses of memory lead her to insist on being taken to a rest home.

programme.title: Movie: The Darkness
programme.desc: Two families, the Taylors and the Carters, take a vacation to the Grand Canyon. When the youngest Taylor, Michael brings back ancient stones, they find strange things happening in the house. They blame Michael, but realize they've awakened an evil force.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald
programme.desc: True to his promise, the dark wizard Grindelwald escapes from custody while being transferred to Europe to answer for his crimes, and begins assembling followers who share his ambitions, but he's opposed by a young wizard with a love of magical beasts.

programme.title: Movie: 127 Hours
programme.desc: A mountain climber must resort to desperate measures after becoming trapped under a boulder in the desert.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: The L Word: Litmus Test
programme.desc: Jenny writes another script that sells; Bette and Kelly go into business; Alice and Tasha have a third-wheel crush; the girls plot a sting operation to test Dylan; Jenny encroaches further on Shane.

programme.title: The L Word: Lactose Intolerant
programme.desc: Jenny throws a baby shower for Max; Bette and Tina hit a roadblock in the adoption process; Bette goes solo to her gallery's opening night celebration; Shane is feeling boxed in by Jenny; Alice starts to feel like three is a crowd.

programme.title: The L Word: Last Couple Standing
programme.desc: A look at the love and drama amidst a group of lesbian friends.

programme.title: The L Word: Last Word
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, what starts out as a celebration of friendship quickly ends in a web of betrayal and deceit; the girls find themselves in the slammer with Sergeant Duffy; and the investigation into Jenny's death begins.

programme.desc: Mayor Feratti ups the ante in his negotiations with the Sullivans, and Ray must step in to finish the deal. Bridget and Smitty are called in to fix Jonathan Walker Hanson's unsavory publicity scandal. Daryll is offered a chance to leave the Donovans.

programme.title: Work In Progress: 180 Almonds
programme.desc: Abby begins an existential life evaluation vowing mortal consequences after 180 days. Her therapist checks out mid-session and a first fate turns into a confrontation with the woman responsible for 'ruining her life.'

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Planner
programme.desc: A workaholic wedding planner falls for the engaged doctor whose wedding she is organizing.

programme.title: Movie: Walking Tall

programme.title: Movie: The Intruder

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: As Cassie struggles to make sense of Lexie’s life and death, we delve into her own difficult past. Meanwhile, Rob’s past finally yields some results in the Katy investigation.

programme.title: Movie: The Lovely Bones
programme.desc: From the afterlife, a young girl tells the story of her family as they attempt to restore normalcy in their lives after her murder. She weighs her desire for her family to heal against her urge for vengeance.

programme.title: Movie: Home of the Brave

programme.title: Movie: The Last Song

programme.title: Movie: The Happening

programme.desc: A love-starved career woman steals coins from the Rome's Fountain of Love. Returning to New York, she is aggressively pursued by a number of strangers who proclaim their love. She wonders if their feelings are genuine or if it's because of the spell.

programme.desc: A fast-lane money broker wakes up to find out how his life could have been as a family man.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wonderland
programme.desc: An artist is forced to put her life on hold and return home to help her family. While at home, she finds herself working closely with her high-school sweetheart who is desperately searching for a home for his school's Christmas dance.

programme.desc: A highly ambitious anchorwoman makes an offhand wish to an office party Santa. She wakes up the next morning to find she is married to her college sweetheart.

programme.title: Movie: Time for Me to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: A cancelled flight lands two unlikely strangers together.

programme.title: Movie: Time for You to Come Home for Christmas

programme.title: Movie: A Bramble House Christmas

programme.desc: Guardian Angel Gaby is sent to the town of Angel Falls to help restore it's Christmas Spirit. There she meets a volunteer fire chief that shows her the true meaning of love.

programme.title: Movie: A Veteran's Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Dashing Through the Snow

programme.desc: A young girl writes a letter to Santa asking for a mother for Christmas after her mother dies.

programme.desc: Regine caters a charity event and is convinced the man running the event is Mr. Right.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Done
programme.desc: In the series finale, the Banks family prepares to move away from California.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Pilot
programme.desc: A teenage boy moves from tough West Philadelphia to live with wealthy relatives in Bel-Air.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Clubba Hubba
programme.desc: In order to take a girl out on a date, Will must first impress her very protective father.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Not With My Pig You Don't
programme.desc: When Philip's parents visit, they embarrass him with stories of his pet pig.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Homeboy, Sweet Homeboy
programme.desc: One of Will's homeboys from Philadelphia, Ice Tray, comes to Bel-Air for a visit.

programme.title: Movie: Save the Last Dance
programme.desc: A talented dancer gives up ballet and is forced to attend a new school after her mother dies. She falls for a fellow dancer despite the social obstacles they face.

programme.title: Movie: Let It Snow
programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: An interior designer is made-of-honour at her friend’s wedding. Before the big day, she ends up stranded in the Christmas Cottage, where rumour has it, all guests will find everlasting love, with the brother of the bride.

programme.title: Movie: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is hired to become a personal shopper for an uptight, corporate executive. As they work together, she teaches him that Christmas has less to do with the money that is spent, and more to do with the people in your life.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Christmas
programme.desc: A resort developer heads to Christmas, Colorado, to scope out a new piece of land. While away, she has a minor car accident and meets the towns handsome sheriff, who helps her have a Christmas to remember.

programme.title: Movie: Switched for Christmas
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters decide to swap lives for the holidays, learning valuable lessons along the way.

programme.title: Movie: A Cookie Cutter Christmas
programme.desc: Two long-time rival school teachers duke it out during the holidays in a bake-off. With both determined to win the prize, their competitiveness could jeopardize what matters most this Christmas season.

programme.title: Movie: A Boyfriend for Christmas
programme.desc: A girl tells Santa she wants a boyfriend for Christmas, years later, her wish comes true.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Tidings of Joy
programme.desc: A writer visits a town searching for a rumoured Christmas time capsule.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actor Matt Cohen from the Hallmark Channel original movie 'Holiday Date' and singer Debbie Gibson stop by. Then, 'Rustic Joyful Food' author Danielle Kartes prepares holiday tiramisu.

programme.title: Movie: With Love, Christmas
programme.desc: An ad executive and her uptight co-worker must create the ultimate Christmas commercial. To complicate things, they are also each-others Secret Santa.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Cartman convinces the boys to toilet paper their teacher's house. But when Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt for the horrendous prank, Cartman tries to kill him.

programme.title: The Office: The Alliance
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim form an alliance to protect themselves during the upcoming downsizing.

programme.title: The Office: Basketball
programme.desc: The office staff prepares for a game of basketball against the workers in the warehouse.

programme.title: The Office: Hot Girl
programme.desc: Michael believes he is going to 'score' when he gives an attractive woman a ride home.

programme.title: The Office: The Dundies
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin employees suffer through the annual office awards ceremony, The Dundies, hosted by their pompous boss Michael Scott at their local watering hole.

programme.title: The Office: Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Just as his best friend Todd Packer visits the office, Michael fears that a new corporate crackdown on sexual harassment will dampen his reputation.

programme.title: The Office: Office Olympics
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight are out of the office for the day as Michael tries to close a deal on a new condo for himself. Meanwhile, Jim and Pam organize an 'Office Olympics' where the staff members compete in ridiculous games.

programme.title: The Office: The Fire
programme.desc: A fire in the kitchen forces the employees of the Dunder Mifflin paper company to the parking lot. To ease everyone's boredom, Jim suggests a game where staff members reveal a little too much information about themselves.

programme.title: The Office: Halloween
programme.desc: Corporate forces Michael to fire someone, putting a damper on the Halloween festivities at Dunder-Mifflin. Jim and Pam put Dwight's resume on job-searching websites, and Jim considers applying for a better job.

programme.title: The Office: The Fight
programme.desc: After Dwight karate punches Michael, Jim organizes a lunchtime rematch at Dwight's dojo where Pam becomes annoyed when Jim gets too friendly with her.

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder-Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: December 9, 2019
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: Lights Out With David Spade
programme.desc: David Spade and a panel of his comedian friends help break down the day's headlines.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime 2000
programme.desc: Cartman is pursued by the FBI for committing a hate crime against Token and lands in juvenile hall.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled Whore Video Play Set
programme.desc: Disturbed by the corruptive influence Paris Hilton has on all little girls in South Park, one of the town's favourite citizens, Mr. Slave, challenges her to a 'whore-off.'

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle become obsessed with Guitar Hero to the point where they're breaking high score records, and it doesn't take long for Stan to realize that he could go even further with a different partner.

programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Reunion

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: Newlyweds are murdered in a small town in Illinois and a local barfly is quickly sent to death row for the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Feds vs. Outlaws
programme.desc: The leader of the notorious Outlaws biker club is accused of a quadruple homicide in Fort Lauderdale. He beats the rap for the murders but is sentenced to death for the car bombing of a federal witness in New Orleans.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.desc: Heavy D continues trying to salvage a wrecked overland camper from Europe, hoping for a big payday. Meanwhile, Sam designs a hub-centric, diesel-powered bicycle with spare and salvaged parts from the shop.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: When Trucks Fly

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Prepare for Liftoff
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers continue transforming their junkyard Bronco into an off-road beast for the Tuff Truck rematch against the Goons and Welder Up. Heavy D customizes a brand new UTV for his friend to break a world record at the live event.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Trucked Out: Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Trucked Out with insider facts and extra scenes: Heavy D and the other stuntmen make death-defying World Record attempts without practice and in extreme weather.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Brothers Vs. The World
programme.desc: Get ready for a crazy night featuring an epic Blazer build, a wild race against a Lamborghini and a record breaking stunt. Then, a huge announcement with the Dirty Mudder Truckers.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Million Dollar Idea
programme.desc: The Debertis tackle their most ambitious build yet, a transformer truck that will revolutionize the industry. Brad performs in the drift truck and is invited to tryout for a rally cross team.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Truck vs. Train
programme.desc: Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Dieselsellerz crew scramble to salvage their Duramax giveaway after it goes up in flames. Heavy D ignores Redbeard's strict budget restrictions to turn their company tow truck into a tricked out, lifted monster.

programme.title: Deadly Seas: The North Atlantic
programme.desc: America's deadliest sea, the North Atlantic claimed over 165 lives in the last ten years. Captain Eddie Welch has survived three hurricanes and a boat sinking.

programme.title: Deadly Seas: The Bering Sea
programme.desc: The Bering Sea has already wrecked six boats in what may be the worst winter in 40 years. Tug Redeemer head out to rescue the latest vessel before the icy weather tears her apart.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Swamp Shiners
programme.desc: Mark and Jeff struggle to set up their remote still site, while Josh and Bill are desperate for cash to build a new copper still. Tensions run high in the Kentucky distillery with Time and his partner Steve, and a new moonshiner appears in Mississippi.

programme.title: Moonshiners: More Shiners, More Problems
programme.desc: Tim Smith hires a person with a checkered past to help at the distillery in Kentucky. Tickle learns how to make moonshine in a copper pot still from one of the best. In North Carolina, Jeff and Mark are surprised by an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hush Money
programme.desc: In North Carolina, Jeff and Mark must pay hush money to the property owner of their still site, while veteran shiner Jim Tom helps Wayne perfect his moonshine recipe. In Virginia, Tickle encounters bad luck when he starts bootlegging his own shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: First Run
programme.desc: Tickle bootlegs at night, while Wayne comes up with an ingenious drop-off plan for his own bootleggers. Equipment failure threatens the production of Tim Smith's legal moonshine, and Josh and Bill finally begin their first run of strawberry brandy.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Blue Moonshine
programme.desc: Josh and Bill are forced back to their day jobs after their shine runs blue. Chico, under financial stress, makes a hard decision that could risk it all. Tickle struggles to keep Tim's old territory supplied. Mark and Jeff move their liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rival Shiners
programme.desc: Tim reaches a milestone with his first bottled batch of shine. Jeff and Mark suspect a rival in their territory. Chico takes a risk that could cost him everything. Josh and Bill's only hope at financing their shine operation is to consider bootlegging.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Bootlegging Blowups
programme.desc: Tim enlists Tickle's help to investigate his new still hand, Chico. Josh and Bill take on new risks as they try to stay alive in the moonshine game as bootleggers. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine War
programme.desc: Tickle goes undercover in Kentucky to find out what Chico has been up to. Josh and Bill hit the open road to bootleg shine at a music festival, but they soon hit a violent roadblock. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition with one shot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Firewater
programme.desc: Josh and Bill suffer the consequences of bootlegging. Darlene goes against her best instinct and lights up her still indoors. Jeff, Mark and Lance find their competition is still out there. Tim takes final measures to protect his legal shine business.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Aftershock
programme.desc: Jeff and Mark look to cash in on one final run of the season. Tickle and Chico's still site is compromised. Mike is desperate to complete his New Orleans order and turns to Darlene. Josh and Bill might get to sell some of their own liquor after all.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and an Awkward Pirate
programme.desc: Christina chooses eclectic entertainment for her reception, hiring a pirate and a German oompah band; Jamie shares the aisle with her dog.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Wall of Flowers
programme.desc: Stephanie walks the aisle in a pre-owned designer gown and Diana's look is retro glam with a birdcage veil.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Premature Departure
programme.desc: Syngin prepares for a month apart from Tania. Anna questions her engagement. Blake and Jasmin's living situation changes unexpectedly. Leaving Russia brings Sasha to tears. Michael and Juliana talk about their financial future. Angela and Michael return.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: You Have to Fight for It
programme.desc: Chitoka takes on her biggest challenge yet and attempts to walk outside for the first time in years. Naomi finds some things remain the same post-surgery.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: It's My Potty and I'll Cry If I Want To
programme.desc: The Busbys return to the world of potty training, determined to succeed this time. Blayke takes gymnastics lessons spends some one-on-one time with her parents. Mimi distances herself from the family, struggling with the loss of her house.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: When Danielle's Away, the Quints Will Play
programme.desc: With Danielle out of town for a work conference, Adam must take care of all six kids for the weekend. Although parenting solo is overwhelming, Adam has huge plans in store for his little ladies. A routine eye checkup for Hazel results in shocking news.

programme.title: Counting On: Five Pregnancies and Counting

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Weight-shaming Victoria

programme.title: Long Island Medium: The Reunion

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Meet the Plaths

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Starving for Independence

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Just Look Cool
programme.desc: Much to Moriah's excitement and disbelief, she and Kim plan out a college tour. Micah tries his hand at modeling but nearly jeopardizes his career before it begins. Ethan, Olivia, Kim and Barry finally sit down to discuss their issues.

programme.title: River Monsters: Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Tales of a body-snatching spirit called the Water Mama have reached Jeremy. With people disappearing without a trace, Jeremy is convinced there is a real river monster lurking behind the legend.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Torpedo

programme.title: River Monsters: Mekong Mutilator
programme.desc: The Mekong River is well known for its monstrous fish. This time, Jeremy is drawn to the spot in Southeast Asia after reports of something that has sliced cleanly through a young man's testicle.

programme.title: River Monsters: Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy investigates terrifying reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys, a beast so violent that it slices through flesh and even breaks bones.

programme.title: River Monsters: Face Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates his most disturbing case yet when he is faced with the story of a man who had his face ripped off in a remote Bolivian river. The journey through dangerous jungle ends with a confrontation with one of his oldest adversaries.

programme.title: River Monsters: Death Down Under
programme.desc: When six men vanish in the remote waters of northern Australia, extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the scene and embarks on one of his toughest investigations yet, taking on some of the deadliest animals on the planet in his search for a suspect.

programme.title: River Monsters: Canadian Horror
programme.desc: From Canada's waterlogged wilderness comes stories of a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade tries to track down this shadowy predator with a mouth said to resemble a bear-trap.

programme.title: River Monsters: Face Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates his most disturbing case yet when he is faced with the story of a man who had his face ripped off in a remote Bolivian river. The journey through dangerous jungle ends with a confrontation with one of his oldest adversaries.

programme.title: River Monsters: Canadian Horror
programme.desc: From Canada's waterlogged wilderness comes stories of a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade tries to track down this shadowy predator with a mouth said to resemble a bear-trap.

programme.title: River Monsters: Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: New Zealand's freshwaters have been a safe place for swimmers, yet as Jeremy finds out, its remote rivers and deep lakes provide refuge for an ancient and slippery predator that has stayed hidden for more than a century.

programme.title: River Monsters: Face Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates his most disturbing case yet when he is faced with the story of a man who had his face ripped off in a remote Bolivian river. The journey through dangerous jungle ends with a confrontation with one of his oldest adversaries.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Last Primates of Madagascar
programme.desc: For some 100 million years the flora and fauna of Madagascar have evolved utterly independent of the rest of the world. Steve travels to this unique biosphere to leap with lemurs, a rare, ancient species of primate.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Canines
programme.desc: A litter of orphaned kittens trail a pair of Dandy Dinmont Terriers. The only girl in a litter of four American Bobtails hunts for her place in the pack. Finally, a naughty Tonkinese kitten proves a handful for her prim and proper mom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Puma on the Rampage
programme.desc: When John married Samantha, he committed to for better or for worse, but he didn't realize her cat Puma would put their vows to the test. Jimmy and Maggie have been married for 45 years, but their 8-year-old snowshoe cat is tearing them apart.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff returns from a free vet care clinic with a dog who was hit by a car. The owner of a kitten with suspected ringworm gets more than she bargained for. Dr. Jeff treats a family dog with a mysterious lump. And, Dr. Baier falls for a rescued puppy.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: The clock is ticking as Dr. Blue performs an emergency C-section on a mother with two puppies stuck in her uterus, while Dr. Ross and Dr. Lavigne work on pets with serious eye issues. The vets test their on-camera skills to create a video for the clinic.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Snakes in a Zoo
programme.desc: Reticulated pythons, 'Jodie Foster' and Bali, are two of the most dangerous animals at the zoo. When a window is broken in their habitat, keepers have to find a way of distracting these man-eating creatures so that the repair work can be completed.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Southern Uprising
programme.desc: Tia and the twins hit the road after she receives back to back calls for help from the South. After helping an army veteran with a new litter of puppies, the team find themselves on a wild chase after an injured dog through the streets of Jackson, MS.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Prison Break
programme.desc: Tia sends Jake and Armando on a rescue mission to Texas, after hearing about two pit bulls who were wounded in a run-in with a porcupine. Then, when a second story about a dog in death row comes in, the guys need to kick it into high gear.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Dogs
programme.desc: Excited hunters are in the woods because spring turkey hunting season has arrived. Laflamme investigates whether someone may have poached a hen. Spahr responds to a call where a girl was attacked by a dog.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Ringer

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A daughter sues her mother for wrecking her vehicle, while the mother countersues the daughter over a snow blower and ruined furniture. Then, two sisters dispute car payments.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend over money she loaned him to purchase for bowling bowls, while the ex-boyfriend countersues for negligence and emotional distress. Then, a friend sues his ex-band member who promised to get his song posted online.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A sister sues her brother for $5,000 and blames his kids for getting evicted. Then, a woman claims a man stole her puppy without paying. He says he would've paid if he wasn't the target of threats and harassment.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: An ex-bridesmaid is sued for stealing and pawning an engagement ring. Then, a couple claim to have been conned into helping a financially distressed family, and are suing for payments and damages to their car. The defendants say they were duped.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Sisters dispute over a cellphone. Then, a man sues a former neighbour for destroying his prized possession chainsaw. The defendant insists he barely used the equipment and is not liable.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Former best friends dispute a lease. Then, a man sues his ex-girlfriend for stealing his jewelry, but she says she didn't steal anything and that the police report corroborates her claim.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Turn the Light Off
programme.desc: Voight and the team discover a massacre, eight-million in cash stolen and two wounded men cleaning house. During questioning, one guy provides some key intel that leads Antonio to realize that two gangs were involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 8:30
programme.desc: Conclusion, the Intelligence Unit works to find the bombers. Even with the government agencies in the mix, Voight and his team work the case from their own angles and connections. Lindsay and Antonio question doctors who handled a transplant surgery.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: My Way
programme.desc: Commander Perry notifies the Intelligence Unit that Pulpo has been released to help track down a dangerous cartel leader. Meanwhile, Ruzek gets some difficult news as a blast from Lindsay's past comes back.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks
programme.desc: As Antonio's life is now in question, Voight and Platt open up about their pasts. Jin is caught while tinkering with Voight's computer and uses the only scapegoat possible to keep him in the clear.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni
programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get My Cigarettes
programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dude, Where's My Ranch?

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons Christmas Stories

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kill Gil, Volumes 1 & 2

programme.title: The Simpsons: Eternal Moonshine of the Simpson Mind

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas

programme.title: The Simpsons: Holidays of Future Passed

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Won't Be Home for Christmas

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Nightmare After Krustmas

programme.title: Untamed Philippines: Enchanted Islands
programme.desc: A nation of more than 100 million people on a collection of over 7,600 islands all set in the warm emerald seas of the Pacific Ocean, the Philippines is a land of sparkling wonder.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Sir Lynx-a-Lot
programme.desc: It's business as usual at Dr. K's exotic animal E.R., until a stressed-out 10-year-old Eurasian lynx is brought in for over-grooming and not eating.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Chinchillin' Like a Villain
programme.desc: Dr. K's staff faces unusual emergencies, including a sick lovebird, an injured hedgehog and one very sick chinchilla.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Turtle-Necked
programme.desc: Dr. K and her team are preparing for surgery on a sulcata tortoise that was brought in with a mass on its neck, when unexpectedly, an emergency case is rushed into the treatment room.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Gallop Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team visit a local breeder to check on her limping horse, DooBee.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: LLama Rama Ding Dong
programme.desc: Temperatures are blazing in Michigan and there are more farm calls than ever for Dr. Pol.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Flu the Coop
programme.desc: The clinic faces the wrath of the flu.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Ready, Vet, Go!
programme.desc: The Dr. Pol Veterinary team is finally getting some relief from their busy schedules in the form of a recent vet school graduate named Dr. Sandra.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey from the Center of the Sun
programme.desc: Discover how light escapes from the sun, from its fiery birth through its 430,000 mile battle against gravity and magnetism to its escape from the solar system.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth: Venus's Evil Twin
programme.desc: There is a hellish planet in our solar system, covered in thick dense clouds and roasted by colossal temperatures. Incredibly this is a vision of Earth's future. To understand how our world will be destroyed we need to look at Earth's evil twin Venus.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Journey to the Alien Jungle
programme.desc: A mysterious expedition into the Amazon might have discovered a mythical lost library containing the secrets of an alien civilization, and experts reveal what they found and if this daring journey proved that humans have made extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth, and what would happen if it ever entered our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Alien Signals
programme.desc: NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, and experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact. However, some fear that such a discovery could have apocalyptic consequences.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mars's Deepest Secret
programme.desc: British astronomers working for the CIA intercept Soviet photos of the moon. A malfunction on the ISS could poison its crew with deadly ammonia gas. A startling image taken by a NASA probe points to evidence that life could exist on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain
programme.desc: Satellites discover American stealth technology deep inside China. An unidentified cloud swamps America's skis. Finally, something truly massive is lurking beneath Loch Ness.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Lost Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of Blood
programme.desc: An ancient man-made volcano might reveal buried treasure and bloody human sacrifice. When NASA discovers a strange pattern in the Arctic ice, experts investigate if it has alien origins. A mystery in the Sahara might have a sinister explanation.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: When Dallas patrol officers respond to a disturbance call, they find an armed parole violator intent on not returning to jail. The suspect fires at police and barricades himself in a bathroom. A SWAT negotiator is called in to talk the man out safely.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Sr. Corporal Steve Claggett and other SWAT members practice their explosive breaching skills. Then, Steve rushes to the scene of an armed barricade where two suspects have allegedly robbed a convenience store.

programme.title: The Big House: Auburn
programme.desc: The State Penitentiary in Auburn, New York is a monument to criminal rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Big House: Leavenworth
programme.desc: An exclusive look at America's first federal prison. Operating since 1895, Leavenworth has had its share of notoriety - from The Birdman of Alcatraz and exciting escapes to bloody riots and escalating violence.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola
programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.desc: Cameras follow an officer on his shift and step inside the Kentucky State Pen high security block.
