programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime of Passion: The Pamela Smart Story
programme.desc: Pamela Smart seduced her 15-year-old lover into killing her husband.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Not Today
programme.desc: Yonkers first responders face unexpected challenges when they respond to a call for a man with a broken ankle who fell from a fire escape. In Tucson, Steven and Sam are called to a structure fire and must search inside for possible victims.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Brotherhood
programme.desc: The brother of a paramedic gets sucker-punched and a pair of best friends are in an accident together. A member of the team comforts a suicidal patient.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Pritchert
programme.desc: Craig Pritchert and his girlfriend are a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. After falling in love, the two go on a bank robbery spree, and flee the country with $500,000 in cash. After being spotted in Cape Town, the FBI sends a team to take the two down.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wish I'd Turned Around
programme.desc: Kat Harris and Marla Kreuger each loved Lawrence Harris in her own way. Each dismissed his dark obsession as childish and strange, but harmless. Neither of them realized he was preparing to sacrifice innocent lives for his evil purpose.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lorenzen Wright: No Defense
programme.desc: A hometown hero is gunned down in the woods, and seven years later police get a tip that changes everything. 48 Hours explores the question of who killed basketball star Lorenzen Wright.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Two men are convicted of a brutal rape they say they didn't commit and DNA evidence backs them up, now a college professor, her students and technology hopes to clear them.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Sand
programme.desc: California beauty Pegye meets ace volleyball player Eric on the pristine sands of Newport Beach. With good looks and success they look like they've got it all but hedonism comes at a price, and living the dream quickly becomes a waking nightmare.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Bad Apple
programme.desc: Nicky and his wife Ellie appear to be living the perfect retirement until one of them is found dead in an apple orchard.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Broken Dreams
programme.desc: The only thing going for Christina Corrigan is Keith Belajonas, a cute 25-year-old she meets online. After a couple of years and kids, they marry. But the honeymoon won't last long, and the jagged edges of their broken dreams will lead to a blood bath.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Millionaire, the Model and the Hit Man
programme.desc: A millionaire was willing to shell out $80,000 to have someone kill his model wife. Investigators discover that the man was cheating on his wife and tries to hire a hit man because he was not winning his divorce.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Grapes of Wrath
programme.desc: It was a business deal right out of a Hollywood movie. An investor in a Napa Valley winery ponied up $800,000 cash in an effort to make a fortune in fine wine. What he didn't realize then was he was investing in his own murder. Tracy Smith reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of a young woman and her aunt are investigated. Susan Spencer is the correspondent.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: The homicide of William Young has gone cold but not for Det. Joe Rasco. After more than a decade, he'll track down every player again to provide the answers to get justice once and for all for William and his family.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: This One's Yours
programme.desc: Det. Pam Dunklin's first homicide as lead investigator begins one balmy summer afternoon when beloved local bartender, Jeff Joplin, is found beaten, strangled and stabbed to death on the floor of his home near Horseshoe Lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Long Arm of the Law
programme.desc: When two unrelated murders are traced to a violent pair of siblings, investigators are led on a wild goose chase, across two countries. It's a case that will consume not only the Tyler and Smith County authorities, but the U.S. Marshals and FBI.

programme.title: Homicide City: Killer Moves
programme.desc: When beloved a DJ, Alberto Martino, is found bludgeoned to death outside his radio station, it's appears to be a robbery gone wrong. But police quickly learn the Martino was not a random victim, but the focus of a carefully orchestrated homicide.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Four stories Behind Enemy Lines; goggles that shed light on the final mission of WWII; court documents detail a killer's last stand; a pistol signifies bravery for covert ops in Vietnam; a baseball signed by a ballplayer who became much more.

programme.title: Gourmet Holiday
programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Dennis by Dennis Basso

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Burnout House
programme.desc: The team goes to Lexington, VA, to see what they can save from a fire-damaged house that had recently been converted to apartments.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a High School into Purposed Goods
programme.desc: The crew save parts from a 1917 high school up in Youngwood, PA.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Splitting Up Jobs
programme.desc: Robert sends Tay and Grayson to salvage in Salem, Virginia, until the crew comes together to help finish the job. Mike and Ted travel to Norfolk, Virginia, to pick up a special nautical structure for a client.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peanut Silo Salvage
programme.desc: The crew score some doors from the Virginia Military Institute before hesitantly taking on a Peanut Silo Salvage in Virginia. After a precarious roof removal they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: North Carolina Pick and Haul
programme.desc: The gang travel to North Carolina in hopes of salvaging a Mediterranean-style mansion in Charlotte and an iconic sign in Raleigh. Though many of the items have been set aside, loading stone tubs and three-tier chandeliers presents its own challenges.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Shopping Center
programme.desc: The team heads to a local shopping center where they use some creative methods to salvage a large, decorative space frame, rolling doors and more.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Delaware
programme.desc: The team faces cold winter weather as they attempt to quickly salvage as much as possible from an old church in Laurel, DE. They remove large stained glass, ceiling tiles, and doors. Later, a build shapes up to look like an outhouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Park-n-Shop Grocery Store
programme.desc: The crew heads to Mike's hometown of Charlotte, North Carolina, to check out the signage they can save from his very first job. Mike and Robert check out the Virginia Transportation Museum and learn that a bank has a need for a conference table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Barnesville
programme.desc: The crew pick through a barn and take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio, looking for some bonus finds. Mike Whiteside meets with a return client who has an idea for a dining table set made from canning baskets and live edge wood.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Boulevard at Capital Centre
programme.desc: The crew get a huge opportunity in suburban Washington, D.C. where they work on the former site of the Capital Centre. The arena was demolished in 2002, but is just now being redeveloped. Later, Tay builds a breakfast table out of a car engine.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Home Sweet Yurt
programme.desc: Yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler live in a village of yurts on the North Shore of Oahu but their family is growing, so they're adding on and building a whopping 1,400-square-foot yurt at the far end of their property.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Namaste Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny Toler meet up with clients Sara and Shawn who want to expand their current home in Haleiwa, Hawaii, to include a multi-functional 16-foot yurt that will serve as a yoga studio and lounge space.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Waterside Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny build a Moroccan-style yurt for client Maisa who wants an affordable place that's all her own on her family's waterfront property.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Windy Yurt
programme.desc: Ryan and Ali are relocating to a beautiful lot on Hawaii's North Shore that they bought unseen on the internet. They've asked yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler to construct a safari-themed yurt.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Our First Yurt
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cheyenne and Austin are calling on yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler to build their first place, a paniolo-inspired 16-foot yurt with a bedroom, bathroom and outdoor dining space on a piece of family farmland in Waimanalo, Oahu.

programme.title: Love Yurts: The Big Kahuna Yurt
programme.desc: Yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler are headed deep into the jungles of Maui, Hawaii, to build their biggest yurt yet. It's a giant two-story, 30-foot, hydro-powered yurt for their off-the-grid clients Christina and Boe.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Eco-Friendly House vs. Hot Mess
programme.desc: Randy wins an old mobile home at auction and strikes up a deal with Casey so they can both make a profit. Meanwhile, the Snow sisters come up with an eco-friendly design for their house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Container Collaboration
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina combine two shipping containers to create a one bedroom house with an outdoor courtyard area. During the build, Gary's Girls approach Casey with an offer to sell him their container house after their previous sale fell through.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters' Roach-Infested Home vs. Randy's Cabin In The Woods
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a red and green 'Christmas Tree' house, but the presents inside aren't what they wanted. Randy scores a cabin in the woods with tons of character, but it's surrounded by trees.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Fitness Farmhouse
programme.desc: Paige and Raf design a house for friends with a passion for fitness. Their plan for the house includes a fitness room, two stunning bathrooms and colors picked out by 'Random Raf.'

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Two-Story vs. Spanish Villa
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina win big when they get a small farmhouse with a bonus room upstairs. They design a chalet-style home that makes the best use of the square footage on both levels. Donna and Toni design their build with a Spanish villa in mind.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Quaint Cottage vs. a Tiny House
programme.desc: The Snow sisters score a little cottage that needs a LOT of TLC. Randy starts out at an advantage with money in his pocket when he grabs a little box house addition that someone offered him $500 to haul away.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eating Las Vegas
programme.desc: Noah Cappe investigates the Great American Foodie Fest in Nevada.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Scone With the Wind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits one of America's top ten largest state fairs to sample the swamp burger, redneck sushi and the chicken 'n' waffles bowl.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fry Harder
programme.desc: Noah Cappe soaks up the California sunshine while enjoying some wacky West Coast treats at the San Diego County Fair in Del Mar, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grill Bill
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Great Lakes to visit the Barry County Fair.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Season's Eatings

programme.desc: Chester and AJ are feuding and Timmy is caught in the middle; mom becomes a weathercaster.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Big Wanda/ Moving Day
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for his Mom could sell a house to anyone; Wanda is called into run business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Selling Out/ Funny Pants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells his restaurant to a big company, but he soon finds retirement boring.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday/ Karate Island
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter the best birthday ever. SpongeBob is assigned the task of finding out what she would like; SpongeBob is invited to a karate competition on the mysterious Karate Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The New Leaf/ Once Bitten
programme.desc: In the battle for fast food supremacy, Plankton has decided to throw in the towel and start a new business selling trinkets and souvenirs; Gary starts biting everyone in town, and Squidward is convinced that he has a rare snail disease.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidtastic Voyage/ That's No Lady
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick shrink and travel inside Squidward's body; Patrick thinks that he must get out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Rise and Shine/ Waiting/ Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: A look inside Patrick Star's rock; SpongeBob must wait for a toy to arrive in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: It's time to give Gary a bath, but he doesn't want to take one.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman is suing after her pet dog was attacked by the defendant's pit bull. Then, a brother sues his brother for a personal loan issued to fix a vehicle.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Karaoke Christmas

programme.title: Mom: Belgian Waffles and Bathroom Privileges

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Baseball Was Better With Steroids
programme.desc: Charlie starts to question his relationship with Chelsea when he hears that Mia is back in town. Meanwhile, Judith goes into labour and Charlie, Alan and Herb rush her to the hospital.

programme.title: Black-ish: Who's Afraid of the Big Black Man
programme.desc: After a situation arises at work, Dre's views are confronted regarding how black people are perceived now versus when he grew up. He wants to be more open-minded about being a part of his community, so he joins the Homeowners' Association.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pops' Pops' Pops
programme.desc: Jack and Diane look for clues about their roots for their class assignment, a history of the Johnson family. When they can't find anything out about the family's past, Pops comes to the rescue with the colourful story.

programme.title: Batwoman: Crisis on Infinite Earths: Part Two
programme.desc: The group uses Ray's invention to track new recruits to help save the universe. The Monitor sends Iris, Clark and Lois in search of a mysterious Kryptonian. Kate and Kara head out to find Bruce Wayne. Mia challenge Sara. Lex Luthor returns.

programme.title: Black Lightning: The Book of Resistance: Chapter Four: Earth Crisis
programme.desc: The Pierce family fears for Jennifer's life.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Screamer
programme.desc: Tommy, a seemingly nice young man, accompanies Rachel to the opening of Joey's play.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Merv Griffin Show
programme.desc: Kramer discovers the set of the old Merv Griffin Show in a dumpster and conducts interviews of everyone who enters his apartment. George's girlfriend is horrified by his disregard for animal life. Jerry is fascinated by his girlfriend's toy collection.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Buy the Book
programme.desc: Molly's excited that her book is finally out and available for purchase but worries obsessively that no one will buy it.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: 818-jklpuzo
programme.desc: Charlie must decide between his fiancée, Chelsea, and his old flame, Mia.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: 8-Bit Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled when he has to design his own video game for school, so he turns to his family for inspiration. Meanwhile, Beverly is worried about Pops’ gambling and ropes Bill Lewis into her latest scheme.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Let's Val Kilmer This Car
programme.desc: When Lainey moves back to town, Barry asks her to the prom; but when she says no, he plans a senior prank with Principal Ball's car to get out of going.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Dumpster Sex
programme.desc: When Deke takes Max to his place after a great first date, his 'home' is nothing like she expected. Meanwhile, Carolyn feels empowered, then scared for her life, after having a shady car towed from the front of their apartment building.
